name: How much time off can I take for treatment of my work-induced heart condition?
description: Up to 312 weeks at 2/3 pay during recovery.[9]

mainEntity.name: How much time off can I take for treatment of my work-induced heart condition?

acceptedAnswer.text: Up to 312 weeks at 2/3 pay during recovery.[9]
acceptedAnswer.description: Temporary total disability pays 2/3 wages up to 312 weeks while unable to work.[9] Utah ODA mirrors WCA benefits for qualifying illnesses.[9] Key factors: doctor restrictions, return-to-work efforts. Coordinate with employer, track all treatments. Extends as medically needed.
